chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl.B.A.No. S – 34 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For Hearing of Bail Application. - 30-01-2024. Mr.Ghulam Rasool Chandio Advocate alongwith applicant Jalal Chandio. Mr.Sardar Ali Shah Addl.P.G. - O R D E R. ZULIFQUAR ALI SANGI, J- Applicant Jalal Chandio has sought pre-arrest bail in Crime No. 330/2023 of Police Station, Shaheed Murtaza Mirani, District Khairpur, registered under sections 377, 511, PPC. The applicant was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 16.01.2024 and today his bail application has come-up for confirmation or otherwise. 2. Earlier the bail application of the applicant was dismissed by the learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge- IV/Gender Based Violence Court, Khairpur vide order dated 28.12.2023. The applicant has therefore approached this Court with the same prayer. 3. Since the facts of the prosecution case have already been mentioned in the bail order as well as in the memo of bail application, therefore there is no need to repeat the same. 4. Learned counsel for the applicant has contended that the applicant has been falsely implicated in the case with malafide intention and ulterior motive on account of the payment of amount as loan taken by the father of victim from the father of present applicant and prays for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail. 5. Learned Addl.P.G has conceded for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant by contending that this is a case of attempt. Complainant Iqbal Ahmed is present and states that he has patched-up the matter outside the Court, therefore he has also no objection if the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is confirmed. 6.

Learned Addl.P.G has conceded for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant by contending that this is a case of attempt. Complainant Iqbal Ahmed is present and states that he has patched-up the matter outside the Court, therefore he has also no objection if the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is confirmed. 6. I have heard the learned counsel for the applicant, learned Addl.P.G appearing on behalf of the State and the complainant and I have also gone through the material available on record with their able assistance. 7. Since per contents of FIR, this is a case of only attempt to commit carnal intercourse, learned Addl.P.G and the complainant have conceded for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail, therefore this bail application is allowed and interim pre-arrest bail already granted to applicant Jalal Chandio, is hereby confirmed on same terms and condition. Cr.B.A.No. S – 34 of 2024 stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Akber.
